reasoning: Le Havre is a lower-tier team in French Ligue 1 that primarily battles relegation (they finished 15th in the 2023-24 season). They face a high risk of being relegated to Ligue 2 at the end of the 2024-25 season, which would make it impossible for them to win Ligue 1 in 2025-26. Even if they remain in the top flight, there is essentially no chance of them overcoming massive financial disparities to beat clubs like PSG, Monaco, and Marseille for the title, equating to odds well below 1%. Due to constraints on the allowed lower bound, I am selecting the minimum possible probability of 0.02.
